LanguageData.Make_FCP_Apparel_NCR_Salvaged_Power_Armo: Convert a T-45 power armor suit into NCR salvaged power armor by stripping out the servomotors and replacing advanced systems with simpler, more maintainable components.
Converting T-45 armor to NCR salvaged power armor.
convert T-45 armor to NCR salvaged power armor
Convert a T-45 power armor helmet into an NCR salvaged power armor helmet by stripping out advanced components and adding NCR modifications.
Converting T-45 helmet to NCR salvaged power armor helmet.
convert T-45 helmet to NCR salvaged power armor helmet
